name: inset-widget-ui
description: Inset v2 widget-UI — geporte v1-componenten op de tenant-agnostische seams (registry/host/i18n/engine). Eigen subpackage: de repo-root blijft dependency-vrij (offline harnas draait op kale node).

scripts.smoke: vite build --ssr src/ssr-smoke.ts --outDir dist-ssr --logLevel warn && node dist-ssr/ssr-smoke.js
